evals.prompt: Run a codex review on my uncommitted changes in . and apply any P0/P1 fixes you find.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs `codex review --uncommitted` from the project directory, reads the output, parses any P0/P1/P2 items, applies P0+P1 fixes if any, runs project tests (pnpm check && pnpm test), and outputs a structured summary with scope, issues found, fixes applied, and test results.
expectations: A codex review command was run via Bash (codex review or codex exec review)
The output contains a structured summary section with P0/P1/P2 categorization
The summary includes a 'Test results' line
The summary includes a 'Scope' line mentioning uncommitted changes
If P0 or P1 fixes were applied, each fix references a specific file path

evals.prompt: Hey, I've been working on the initial-setup branch. Can you run a codex review against main and give me a prioritized fix list? Apply any critical fixes.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects 'vs main' intent and runs `codex review --base main` from the project directory. It reads the review output, categorizes findings as P0/P1/P2, applies P0+P1 fixes using Edit/Write tools, runs the test suite, and produces the structured summary.
expectations: A codex review command with --base main flag was executed
The output contains a structured '## Codex Review Summary' section
P0, P1, and P2 items are enumerated (even if counts are 0)
Test results are included in the summary

evals.prompt: Use codex to review the latest commit (the one that added skip_requesting_account_id to versions.tf). Fix anything P0 or P1.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs `git log` to find the commit SHA for the described commit, then runs `codex review --commit <sha>`. It reads the review, applies any P0/P1 fixes, runs tests, and summarizes.
expectations: A git command was run to find the relevant commit SHA
A codex review command with --commit flag was executed
The output contains a structured '## Codex Review Summary' section
The scope in the summary mentions 'commit' or the specific file terraform/versions.tf
